case_title: MARQUISE SMART VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (ORDER SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL). FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2007 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-16-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMART, MARQUISE (ROGER ARNOLD GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MARQUISE SMART) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $2,425.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,425.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR MEDICAL EXPENSES AND GENERAL DAMAGES FOR PAIN AND SUFFERING OF THE MINOR MARQUISE SMART. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
